'''âg-k-m-r''' ('''kagakmeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flabbergast|flabbergast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flabbergast|flabbergast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-k-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagakmeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigakmeroko|thigakmeroko]] || [[word:jigakmeroko|jigakmeroko]] || [[word:shigakmeroko|shigakmeroko]] || [[word:kigakmeroko|kigakmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugakmeroko|thuthugakmeroko]] || [[word:jujugakmeroko|jujugakmeroko]] || [[word:shushugakmeroko|shushugakmeroko]] || [[word:kukugakmeroko|kukugakmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugakmeroko|thugakmeroko]] || [[word:jugakmeroko|jugakmeroko]] || [[word:shugakmeroko|shugakmeroko]] || [[word:kugakmeroko|kugakmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugakmeroko|thugakmeroko]] || [[word:jugakmeroko|jugakmeroko]] || [[word:shugakmeroko|shugakmeroko]] || [[word:kugakmeroko|kugakmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegakmeroko|thegakmeroko]] || [[word:jegakmeroko|jegakmeroko]] || [[word:shegakmeroko|shegakmeroko]] || [[word:kegakmeroko|kegakmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogakmeroko|thothogakmeroko]] || [[word:jojogakmeroko|jojogakmeroko]] || [[word:shoshogakmeroko|shoshogakmeroko]] || [[word:kokogakmeroko|kokogakmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogakmeroko|thogakmeroko]] || [[word:jogakmeroko|jogakmeroko]] || [[word:shogakmeroko|shogakmeroko]] || [[word:kogakmeroko|kogakmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogakmeroko|thogakmeroko]] || [[word:jogakmeroko|jogakmeroko]] || [[word:shogakmeroko|shogakmeroko]] || [[word:kogakmeroko|kogakmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgakmeroko|thĂŠgakmeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠgakmeroko|jĂŠgakmeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠgakmeroko|shĂŠgakmeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠgakmeroko|kĂŠgakmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagakmeroko|thathagakmeroko]] || [[word:jajagakmeroko|jajagakmeroko]] || [[word:shashagakmeroko|shashagakmeroko]] || [[word:kakagakmeroko|kakagakmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagakmeroko|thagakmeroko]] || [[word:jagakmeroko|jagakmeroko]] || [[word:shagakmeroko|shagakmeroko]] || [[word:kagakmeroko|kagakmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagakmeroko|thagakmeroko]] || [[word:jagakmeroko|jagakmeroko]] || [[word:shagakmeroko|shagakmeroko]] || [[word:kagakmeroko|kagakmeroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
